documentation.description:
Mux Mode
0 - AINp = AIN0 and AINn = AIN1 (default)
1 - AINp = AIN0 and AINn = AIN3
2 - AINp = AIN1 and AINn = AIN3
3 - AINp = AIN2 and AINn = AIN3
4 - AINp = AIN0 and AINn = GND (single ended)
5 - AINp = AIN1 and AINn = GND (single ended)
6 - AINp = AIN2 and AINn = GND (single ended)
7 - AINp = AIN3 and AINn = GND (single ended)

Comp_que (Comparator queue and disable)
0 - Assert after one conversion
1 - Assert after two conversions
2 - Assert after three conversions
3 - Disable comparator (default)

Comp_pol (Comparator Polarity)
0 - Active low (default)
1 - Active high

Comp_lat (Latching Comparator)
0 - Non-latching comparator (default)
1 - Latching comparator

simple_types.name: comp_que_type
simple_types.code: type comp_que_type is (comp_que_1, comp_que_2, comp_que_3, comp_que_d);

simple_types.name: data_rate_type
simple_types.code: type data_rate_type is (dr_0128, dr_0250, dr_0490, dr_0920, dr_1600, dr_2400, dr_3300);

documentation.description:
Comp_mode (Comparator Mode)
0 - Traditional, with hysteresis (default)
1 - Window comparator

simple_types.name: mux_mode_type
simple_types.code: type mux_mode_type is (a0_a1, a0_a3, a1_a3, a2_a3, a0_gnd, a1_gnd, a2_gnd, a3_gnd);

documentation.description:
PGA (Programmable Gain Amplifier)
0 - FS = 6.144V
1 - FS = 4.096V
2 - FS = 2.048V (default)
3 - FS = 1.024V
4 - FS = 0.512V
5 - FS = 0.256V
6 - FS = 0.256V
7 - FS = 0.256V

simple_types.name: pga_type
simple_types.code: type pga_type is (pga_6_144, pga_4_096, pga_2_048, pga_1_024, pga_0_512, pga_0_256);

documentation.description:
Mode
0 - Continuous conversion mode
1 - Power-down single-shot mode (default)

record_types.name: ADS1015_config

tagged_types.name: ADS1015_record
tagged_types.code: type ADS1015_record is new i2c_device_record with private;

documentation.description:
Configuration record
Config register bits
15 - Operational status
14 - Mux2
13 - Mux1
12 - Mux0
11 - PGA2
10 - PGA1
 9 - PGA0
 8 - Mode
 7 - DR2
 6 - DR1
 5 - DR0
 4 - Comp_mode
 3 - Comp_pol
 2 - Comp-lat
 1 - Comp_que1
 0 - Comp_que0

Configuration record
Config register bits
15 - Operational status
14 - Mux2
13 - Mux1
12 - Mux0
11 - PGA2
10 - PGA1
 9 - PGA0
 8 - Mode
 7 - DR2
 6 - DR1
 5 - DR0
 4 - Comp_mode
 3 - Comp_pol
 2 - Comp-lat
 1 - Comp_que1
 0 - Comp_que0

documentation.description: Set ADC configuration to new value

documentation.description:
Use to start conversion when in single shot mode.  No effect in
  continuous mode.

subprograms.code: procedure start_conversion(self : in out ADS1015_record; error : out err_code)

documentation.description:
Checks if conversion is in progress.  Will always return false
  (conversion in progress) while in continuous mode.  Returns true
  when no conversion is in progress.
